caption: A man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt sits in front of a computer screen displaying a website for "2021 TOPPS TRANSCENDENT COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION BASEBALL HOBBY CASE BREAK #1 *RANDOM HIT*". The website lists a price of "$449.99" and includes a "ADD TO CART" button. To the man's right sits a cardboard shipping box with the word "TRANSCENDENT" printed on it. In the lower right corner of the screen, a red "Subscribe" button is visible alongside the text "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!". As the video progresses, the screen changes from the product page to a bright orange screen, and then returns to the product page where the "ADD TO CART" button has been replaced by a grey "SOLD OUT" button. The website header displays categories such as "FOOTBALL", "BASEBALL", and "BASKETBALL", as well as the URL "WWW.JASPYSCASEBREAKS.COM".
